sections.sectionTitle: Biakinn Kong Gei-ah Khebai Mi Khat Kidamsak

verses.text: Nikhat, thunget hun nitak nai thum laitakin biakinn-ah Peter leh Johan a pai uh hi
Kongpi Hoih a kici gei-ah a suahtunga kipan a khebai mi khat na om hi. Biakinn-ah a pai mite tung panin sum a ngen dingin nisimin hih kongpi gei-ah amah hong kikoih zel hi
Peter leh Johan, biakinn-ah a hong pai a muh ciangin sum a na ngen hi
Amaute gel in tua mipa limtakin en uh a, Peter in, “Kote hong en dih in,” a ci hi
Bang khat peuhpeuh ngahding, ci-in kilamen ahih manin amaute a en hi
Peter in ama kiangah, “Sum ka nei peuhmah kei hi; ahi zongin ka neih kong pia ding hi. Nazareth khuami Jesuh Khrih min tawh, dingin lam na paina dingin thu ka hong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin
a taklam khutin lenin kaito a, thakhat thu-in a khe leh a siakmitte hong khauhpah hi
Tua ciangin amah hong diangin dingto a, lam a pai kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin biakinn-ah amaute zui a, lam paikawm diangkawmin Pasian a phat hi
Mi khempeuh in amah lam pai-in Pasian a phatna mu uh a
biakinn Kongpi Hoih gei-ah sum ngenin a tupa hi, ci-in a thei uh hi. Ama tunga thupiang a muh uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi.
Tua mipa in Peter leh Johan beel cinten a, mi khempeuh in hih thupiang lamdangsa uh ahih manin amaute' omna Solomon' Talap a kici-ah mite a hong tai uh hi

Peter in hih mite a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ka mipih Israel mite aw, bang hangin hih thupiang lamdangsa a, bang hangin ko hong hici et na hi uh hiam? Hih mipa lam ka paisak theihna uh, komau' vang leh komau' hoihna hang sa na hi uh hiam

I pupite Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob Pasian in a nasem Jesuh tungah ama vangliatna a pia hi. Note in aana neite khutsungah tua Jesuh na pia uh a, Pilat mangpa in amah khahdingin a ngaihsut khit ciang nangawnin Pilat' maitang mahah amah na nial teitei uh hi
Amah mihoih mi siangtho hinapi-in, amah na nial zawsop uh a, mi that khat a khahkhiatna dingin Pilat kiangah na ngen uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite tungah nuntakna a piapa na that uh a, ahi zongin sihna panin Pasian in amah hingkiksak hi. Kote gel pen hih thu a thei teci ka hi uh hi

Hih Jesuh min' vangliatna in hih khebai mipa tungah thahatna a pia ahi hi. Note khempeuh in na theih uh mah bangin hih mipa bangzah takin khebai ahih hangin Jesuh upna leh ama min hangin hih mipa in dam siangthona a ngah ahi hi
“Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note leh na makaite uh hih bangin Jesuh tungah na gamtatna uh na theihlohna hang uh hi, ci-in ka thei hi
Ama Khrih in a thuakna ding thu, Pasian in tanglai pekin kamsangte khempeuh tung tawnin genkhol a, tu-in hih bangin a thugen kholhna a hong tungsak ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin na mawhnate uh hong sawpsiangsak theihna ding, Topa kiang panin a hong pai lungsim nopna hun na ngah theihna ding uh leh note-a' dingin a sehsa Jesuh Khrih a hong sawltheihna dingin na mawhna uh kisik un la, Pasian kiang zuan un
Pasian in ama kamsang mi siangthote tung tawnin tanglai-in a genkholhsa bangin, na khempeuh a thakin a kibawl hundong mateng vantungah Jesuh a om ding ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in, ‘Kei a hong sawl mah bangin note sung mah panin note-a' ding kamsang khat Topa na Pasian un note kiangah hong sawl ding hi. Ama hong thugen khempeuh na mang ding uh hi
Tua kamsangpa' thugen a manglo khempeuh, a Jew mipihte kiang panin kikhen khia-in kisusia ding hi,’ ci hi
Samuel-a kipan ama nunga hong piang kamsang khempeuh in tu laitaka thupiangte mah genkhol ciat uh hi

Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte thupha ka piak bangin leitung mi khempeuh thupha ka pia ding hi,’ ci ahih manin, Pasian in ama kamsangte tung tawnin a thuciamte khempeuh eite-a' ding hi a, Pasian in i pu i pate tawh a thuciamte, eite in zong a ngah ding ihi hi
Eite khempeuh i gitlohna panin kikheelin thupha a hong piaktheihna dingin Pasian in a Nasem dingin Jesuh teelin, eite kiangah a hong sawl masa ahi hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi.
